request_payload.exposure_text: Our allies are failing us. While we invest in shared defense, others cut budgets and prioritize domestic politics. Remember the 2024 cyberattacks? They exploited exactly these gaps. We can't afford to be the only ones taking national security seriously. It's time to demand real commitment from our partners or reconsider our burden-sharing. #NationalSecurityFirst
